prestazioni: Engine: F152C 6.3L V12 (6262cc) naturally aspirated with a custom Novitec Rosso Stage 3+ ECU remap, targeting 850+ HP at 9000 RPM via optimized ignition timing, fuel pressure (1200cc injectors from Injector Dynamics ID1700x), and individual throttle body (ITB) airflow recalibration for peak torque (700+ Nm) at 6750 RPM without sacrificing reliability

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo conversion using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (1.28 A/R, 88mm compressor wheels) with custom 3D-printed titanium exhaust manifolds by Capristo, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom Novitec intercooler setup (1000hp-capable) with dual 40mm core heat exchangers and methanol injection (AEM 340lph pump, Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) for IAT control under sustained boost (1.2 bar peak)

Drivetrain: Reinforced 7-speed F1 DCT with a custom Albins ST-1 sequential gearbox (short-throw shifter, carbon-fiber shift forks) and a 200-cell Drexler limited-slip differential with 75% lockup under load, paired with a Novitec Rosso lightweight flywheel (40% reduction) and uprated Sachs Performance dual-mass clutch (1200Nm torque capacity) for instantaneous power delivery
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Novitec Rosso N-Largo widebody kit (carbon-fiber, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear) with integrated active aero (adjustable rear wing with 3 positions, front splitter with 3-stage Gurney flaps) and a custom Vorsteiner V-FF107 carbon-fiber diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets (Capristo 102mm tips, Inconel 625 construction)

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, high-speed rebound), custom valving for the F12 TDF’s rear multi-link setup, and Eibach ERS race springs (20% stiffer front, 15% stiffer rear) with spherical bearing top mounts (SuperPro) for zero compliance, paired with a custom Novitec Rosso front strut brace (TIG-welded 7075 aluminum)

Wheels & Brakes: HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x11.5 front, 21x13 rear, 3-piece construction) with custom center-lock adapters (BBS-style, titanium hardware) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (305/30 R20 front, 345/25 R21 rear), paired with a full Brembo GT-RS 6x40mm caliper upgrade (front) and 4x40mm (rear) with 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors (grooved, 3D-printed titanium hats) and Pagid RSL29 brake pads
